metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "backuppilot":
              # Phrase the backup pilot role similarly to commander
              return f"had backup pilot {obj}"
with:
  if p == "backuppilot":
              # Phrase the backup pilot role with possessive form
              return f"{subj}'s backup pilot was {obj}"
Change 2: Replace:
  for subj, items in groups.items():
          # No special handling; treat all predicates uniformly
          subject_phrase = subj
          remaining_items = items
  
          descriptors = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in remaining_items]
          if not descriptors:
              # Only nationality present
              sentences.append(f"{subject_phrase}.")
              continue
          if len(descriptors) == 1:
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {descriptors[0]}."
          else:
              # Join all but last with commas
              body = ", ".join(descriptors[:-1])
              # Add final part with conjunction
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {body}, and {descriptors[-1]}."
          sentences.append(sent)
with:
  for subj, items in groups.items():
          subject_phrase = subj
          descriptors = []
          for t in items:
              d = phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object)
              # If the descriptor already includes the subject (possessive form), use it as a full ...
              if d.startswith(f"{subj}'s "):
                  sentences.append(f"{d}.")
              else:
                  descriptors.append(d)
          if not descriptors:
              continue
          if len(descriptors) == 1:
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {descriptors[0]}."
          else:
              body = ", ".join(descriptors[:-1])
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {body}, and {descriptors[-1]}."
          sentences.append(sent)
